Allows for a macro to continue onto the next macro by using '/nextmacro' on the last line of a macro.

Adding '/nextmacro down' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #11
Also allows executing any macro from chat using '/runmacro'

✔ Advanced Mode – Create custom macro setups for deeper character customization.
✔ Profile-Specific Designs – Use multiple outfits, styles, and looks per character.
✔ Favorites & Sorting – Keep profiles organized by name, date, or importance.

Whether you're roleplaying, gposing, or just love quick customization, Character Select+ makes switching between characters faster, easier, and seamless.

plugins.Author: JonKazama-Hellion
plugins.Name: Hellion Chat
plugins.Description:
Hellion Chat is built on top of Chat 2 with one removal and a stack
of privacy controls on top. Tabs, channel filters, RGB colours,
emotes, screenshot mode, IPC integration and the chat replacement
window itself work the same. The optional webinterface that Chat 2
ships is intentionally not part of this fork because it serves a
different use case from the smaller default footprint Hellion Chat
is built around.

On top of that, Hellion Chat adds privacy and data-handling controls
designed to align with the modern data protection rules that apply
across the EU, the United States and Japan. By default only your own
conversations are stored; messages from strangers, NPCs and system
spam stay out of the database. Retention windows are configurable per
channel, history can be wiped retroactively, and stored data can be
exported on demand.

Key additions on top of Chat 2:

- Channel whitelist with a Privacy-First default
- Per-channel retention with a daily background sweep
- Retroactive cleanup with a Ctrl+Shift confirm
- Export to Markdown, JSON or CSV
- First-run wizard with three preset profiles (Privacy-First, Casual,
  Full History)
- Bilingual UI (English and German) with live language switching
- Independent plugin state — own config file and database directory,
  so Hellion Chat does not share state with the upstream plugin

Based on Chat 2 by Infi and Anna, licensed under EUPL-1.2.

plugins.Description:
Heliosphere is a mod manager and platform designed to work directly with
Penumbra. It enables efficient downloads and fast installs to let you get back
to the fun part of mods: using them.

Heliosphere supports:
- Direct install to Penumbra
- Compressed and deduplicated (read: small) downloads
- Automatic updates (optional)
- Version history
- Mod changelogs
- Pictures in Penumbra

Give Heliosphere a try, and see if you can't say goodbye to any old mod
platform you were using before.

plugins.Author: The Redheaded Witch, WillWolf76
plugins.Name: Fashion Report Calculator / Dye Finder
plugins.Description:
This is the new and improved Fashion Report System. This plugin will allow you to open a window that will show you what your fashion report status is vs the current week's theme.

There are a few parts to this. Since the only way to get Fashion Report for the week to my knowledge is speaking to Masked Rose after Tuesdays reset, this plugin takes the first person who does talk to him and updates everyone else. So only one person per week needs to speak to Masked Rose.

You can click on a theme and pull all the known items for that theme for that specific slot. You also get a very detailed breakdown of how much points you are getting based on what you are currently wearing.

The plugin also stores the attempts of those using the mod (just the data from fashioncheck, no user information) so that we can figure out the dyes faster and share information faster. The information in this table is wiped every week since once we discover the dyes, it is useless.

I still have more upgrades to do, including adding a dye window and the window that will help calculate the weekly dyes. I already have an idea of how I want to write them, so it shouldn't take me too long. If you have suggestions on how I can upgrade this, please share with me on github!

Credit for the program goes to it's original creator, WillWolf76, who wrote this for me originally.

When this plugin updates the database, it also updates my Discord Bot which you can set up to post fashion report each week. It's set to update on Tuesdays and Fridays (week start and dye information added). Link to add the Discord Bot is in the about section.

plugins.Author: MacaronDream
plugins.Name: Questionable Companion

- Automatic character switching and quest tracking

- Stop point configuration for controlled progression

It leverages tools like Vnavmesh for precise navigation, LifeStream for efficient travel, and TextAdvance for dialogue handling, keeping pace with game updates and user needs.

Originally created by Liza Carvelli.

Not all quests are supported, check Discord for support.

Active 'refresh all retainers' walks the bell automatically to repopulate snapshots. Snapshots are also collected passively whenever you summon a retainer and open the sell list. Character bag and saddlebag are displayed as separate sections (entrust-then-list flow planned). Six-language UI (EN/JA/DE/FR/ZH/KO). Warns once at startup if AutoRetainer is also loaded since both drive retainer summoning.
